DOLL.title: Doll
DOLL.description:
Summons that trigger specific effects at the start or end of your turn.Each type of [gold]Doll[/gold] has its own quantity cap. When the cap is exceeded, further creations will instead trigger the specified effect of all [gold]Dolls[/gold] of that type.
 When you take unblocked damage, it is evenly distributed among all [gold]Dolls[/gold] (rounded down).
RECYCLE.title: Recycle
RECYCLE.description: Remove a [gold]Doll[/gold] and put 3 (>100% HP)/2 (100% HP)/1 (<100% HP) [gold]Doll Part(s)[/gold] into your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold] based on its current HP.
SHANGHAI.title: Shanghai Doll
SHANGHAI.description:
Base HP: [red]10[/red]
Intent: At the end of the turn, deal 6 damage to a random enemy.
Cap 10: Act immediately once.
PENGLAI.title: Hourai Doll
PENGLAI.description:
Base HP: [red]4[/red]
Intent: At the start of the turn, gain 4 max HP.
Special: When taking damage, deal damage equal to its HP to all enemies(don't effect on death).
Cap 4: Immediately make all enemies lose HP equal to its max HP, then [gold]Recycle[/gold] itself.
XIZANG.title: Tibetan Doll
XIZANG.description:
Base HP: [red]6[/red]
Intent: None.
Special: While active, whenever a [gold]Doll[/gold] dies or is recycled, immediately create a [gold]Tibetan Doll[/gold].
Cap 6: At the start of your next turn, gain 1 energy and draw 1 card.
HINA.title: Hina Doll
HINA.description:
Base HP: [red]5[/red]
Intent: At the end of the turn, give you 1 [gold]Artifact[/gold].
Special: On death or recycle, remove all your debuffs.
Cap 1: Remove all your debuffs, then [gold]Recycle[/gold] itself.
GOLIATH.title: Goliath Doll
GOLIATH.description:
Base HP: [red]20[/red]
Intent: At the end of the turn, gain 4 [gold]Block[/gold], plus 2 additional [gold]Block[/gold] for each [gold]Doll[/gold].
Cap 2: [gold]Block[/gold] on all [gold]Dolls[/gold] does not expire at the start of their next turn.
WAX.title: Wax Doll
ROUND_TABLE.title: Round Table Doll
ROUND_TABLE.description:
Base HP: [red]12[/red]
Intent: At the end of the turn, gain 2 [gold]Plated Armor[/gold] and deal 2 damage to all enemies.
Cap 12: All [gold]Dolls[/gold] gain 1 [gold]Plated Armor[/gold].
FRANCE.title: France Doll
FRANCE.description:
Base HP: [red]10[/red]
Intent: At the end of the turn, randomly deal 4 damage twice.
Cap 8: Act immediately a number of times equal to the number of enemies not intending to attack.
ORL.title: Orleans Doll
ORL.description:
Base HP: [red]10[/red]
Intent: At the end of the turn, gain 6 [gold]Block[/gold], then deal damage equal to current [gold]Block[/gold] to a random enemy.
Cap 3: If you have [gold]Block[/gold], double it; otherwise, gain 12 [gold]Block[/gold].
NETHERLAND.title: Netherland Doll
NETHERLAND.description:
Base HP: [red]30[/red]
Intent: At the end of the turn, deal 10 damage to all enemies, decreasing by 2 each turn. Special: This [gold]Doll[/gold] does not absorb damage.
Cap 4: Reset damage to 10.
RUSSIA.title: Russia Doll
RUSSIA.description:
Base HP: [red]8[/red]
Intent: At the end of the turn, for each enemy intending to attack, increase the intent value of all other dolls by 2.
Cap 3: You and all [gold]Dolls[/gold] gain 2 [gold]Strength[/gold].
BOMB.title: Oedo Doll
BOMB.description:
Base HP: [red]2[/red]
Intent: Deal 8 damage to all enemies, then die.
Cap 12: Double the damage.
LONDON.title: London Doll
LONDON.description:
Base HP: [red]12[/red]
Intent: At the start of the turn, give all enemies 3 [gold]Poison[/gold].
Cap 4: Immediately trigger [gold]Poison[/gold] on all enemies.
CURSE.title: Cursed Doll
CURSE.description:
Base HP: [red]6[/red]
Intent: At the end of the turn, give all enemies 1 [gold]Weak[/gold] and [gold]Vulnerable[/gold]; if an enemy has debuffs, also make it lose [gold]Strength[/gold] equal to the number of debuff types.
Cap 2: All enemies lose 1 [gold]Strength[/gold]; if an enemy has debuffs, additionally lose [gold]Strength[/gold] equal to the number of debuff stacks.
